basic_details.job_title: Tinsukia Judiciary Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Peon and Cleaner/ Safai Karmachari Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tinsukia Judiciary Peon and Cleaner/ Safai Karmachari Notification 2026 has been released on 10 June 2026 on the official website tinsukia.dcourts.gov.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the Tinsukia Judiciary Peon and Cleaner/Safai Karmachari Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: As per Govt. Norms for reserved categories in pursuance of Govt. O.M. No. ABP.6/2016/51, Dated 2nd September, 2020

qualification.details: Peon: VIII standard pass (candidates who have passed HSSLC or above shall be ineligible) Cleaner/Safai Karmachari: VIII standard pass (candidates who have passed HSSLC or above shall be ineligible)

salary_details.details: Peon: Rs.12,000 - 52,000/- + Grade Pay Rs.3,900/- Cleaner/Safai Karmachari: Rs.12,000 - 52,000/- + Grade Pay Rs.3,900/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Tinsukia Judiciary Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://tinsukia.dcourts.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Tinsukia Judiciary Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Tinsukia Judiciary Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications for the Tinsukia Judiciary Recruitment 2026 is 25th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Peon and Cleaner/Safai Karmachari posts?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for both Peon and Cleaner/Safai Karmachari posts is VIII standard pass. Candidates who have passed HSSLC or above are ineligible for these positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Tinsukia Judiciary Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates applying for these posts is between 18 years and 40 years as of 01-01-2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available in the Tinsukia Judiciary Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced by Tinsukia Judiciary for the posts of Peon and Cleaner/Safai Karmachari. 3 vacancies are for Peon and 2 for Cleaner/Safai Karmachari.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered for both Peon and Cleaner/Safai Karmachari posts is Rs. 12,000 to Rs. 52,000 per month, along with a Grade Pay of Rs. 3,900.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Tinsukia Judiciary Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Tinsukia Judiciary Recruitment 2026. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Tinsukia Judiciary Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Tinsukia Judiciary Recruitment 2026 will be based on an Interview/Viva-voce. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in this stage.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for the Tinsukia Judiciary Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Tinsukia Judiciary, which is https://tinsukia.dcourts.gov.in/. Links are also provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to attach self-attested copies of necessary documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates along with the filled application form.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Tinsukia Judiciary Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications for the Tinsukia Judiciary Recruitment 2026 is 25th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.
